zh.Dorchester Center, Boston, Suffolk, Mass: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓多爾斯特 特
zh.Willoughby, Sloothby, Lincolnshire, Engl: 英國林可爾史爾維洛賀比
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Ainsworth於1625年出生在英國林可爾史爾維洛賀比時，他的父親Jeremiah Ainsworth13歲，母親Mary Worburton11歲。他和Alice Elizabeth Smith至少有1個兒子。他去世於1680年11月30日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓多爾斯特 特享年55歲。

nameMeanings.name: Ainsworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place near Manchester named Ainsworth, from the Old English personal name Ægen + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.
English (Yorkshire): in Yorkshire the name was a variant of, or confused with   Hainsworth  .

variants.name: Hainsworth
meanings: (Yorkshire): habitational name from Hainworth in Keighley, Yorkshire, named from the Old English personal name Hagena + Old English worth ‘enclosure’. The intrusive -s- was acquired by the late 15th century, probably through false association with the Lancashire surname Ainsworth in 2 below.
variant of Ainsworth in Lancashire. Names such as de Haynesworth and de Heynesworth occur in the surrounding area in the 14th century.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When John Ainsworth was born in 1625, in Willoughby, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Jeremiah Ainsworth, was 13 and his mother, Mary Worburton, was 11. He had at least 1 son with Alice Elizabeth Smith. He died on 30 November 1680, in Dorchester Center, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 55.

Il est décédé le 30 novembre 1680, à Dorchester Center, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 55 ans.

ko.Dorchester Center, Boston, Suffolk, Mass: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴 도르체스터 세터
ko.lifeSummary: John Ainsworth(이)가 1625년 영국 링코실르 윌루그h비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jeremiah Ainsworth(은)는 13세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Worburton(은)는 11세였다. 그는 Alice Elizabeth Smith(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1680년 11월 30일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴 도르체스터 세터에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Dorchester Center, Boston, Suffolk, Mass: дорчестир кентир, бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Ainsworth родился в 1625 г. в местности уиллоугби, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Jeremiah Ainsworth было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Worburton, 11. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Alice Elizabeth Smith. Он умер 30 ноября 1680 г. в местности дорчестир кентир, бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 55 лет.
